summary: Admin customers page correctly displays success state with customer table, search/filter controls, and proper data columns. Visual implementation uses appropriate dark theme for admin interface, maintaining separation from public marketing surfaces. Minor advisory notes on filter state visibility and potential mobile responsiveness considerations.

violations.description: Status filter dropdown state could be more visually prominent - current implementation shows filter controls but selected state may not be immediately clear to operators scanning the interface
Table row density appears quite tight which may impact scanning efficiency for operators managing large customer lists, though this doesn't violate any specific requirements

actions: Consider enhancing status filter visual feedback to make current selection more prominent
Verify mobile narrow contract compliance at 390px viewport as specified in screen spec
Validate that billing health sort toggle functionality works as specified
